ltc:collectionName.description: A short title that summarizes the collection objects contained in the virtual collection.

ltc:description.description: A description or narrative about the collection.
examples: A virtual reference collection including key bumblebee specimens

ltc:basisOfScheme.description: This property is intended to summarise the reason for grouping a number of objects together.

schema:contentURL.description: URI for a media item that is representative for the virtual collection

ods:hasTargetDigitalObjectFilter.description: Contains the filters that the collection uses

ltc:hasGeographicContext.description: Contains the geographic context of the virtual collection, for example the country or region that the collection focuses on.

dwc:country.description: The country that is part of the geographic context of the virtual collection, following the controlled vocabulary of https://dwc.tdwg.org/terms/#dwc:country

ods:hasEntityRelationships.description: Contains relationships to external resources that provide further information about the virtual collection, for example references to non DiSSCo specimen or publications

ods:hasTombstoneMetadata.description: Object containing the tombstone metadata of the object. Only present when ods:status is ods:Tombstone
